meta.title: Why DevOps in ICS?
meta.description: Kelly Shortridge gave an important, eye-opening keynote at S4x20 on why we need to be starting on DevOps in ICS. Here is a 3-minute highlight clip. Beyond explaining the benefits, I think her best point is the ICS community needs to start working with this in predictive maintenance and other lower consequence areas to build up the skill set.
